title: MSO Cobblemon
description: MSOC3 is server-focused modpack that looks to expand upon the adventure and creativity Cobblemon has to offer!
body:
### Welcome to MSO Cobblemon 3, now with newly added removal of **Create!**

This multiplayer-focused modpack looks expand upon and improve the experience of Cobblemon!

- **Adventuring in Cobblemon**: Collect Pokemon, train them up, and battle trainers to become the best like no one ever was! Expand the Cobblemon expirence with great mods like [Ride On!](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-ride-on), [Radical Trainers](https://modrinth.com/mod/rctmod), and even breeding!

Cobblemon Pokemon Datapacks/Mods Used:

  - [Pokemon: Legends Untold](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cobblemon-legendary-structures) by TSFlareon

  - [Cobblemon: Mega Showdown](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-mega-showdown) by YajatKaul

  - [All the Mons x Mega Showdown](https://modrinth.com/datapack/allthemons-x-mega-showdown-legacy) pack by Lvnatic, derived from the [All the Mons](https://modrinth.com/datapack/allthemons) pack by easy_____


## Highly recommend 4GB or higher when using this modpack


<details>
<summary>For those who play on worlds using the MSO Cobblemon 1.3.0 Modpack w/ Create
</summary>
 Highly recommended to continue using the 1.3.0 modpack version and DO NOT update your modpack and save file to v2.0+. MSOC3 w/ Create will also not be maintained or updated, so apologies for any future bugs or compatibility issues.
</details>
